name: hadaf-rag-chatbot
description: AI-powered RAG admission and student support chatbot for Hadaf College.

scripts.dev: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:full: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run faiss"
